form.formComment: Last start won by 0.9 len at this track Hcp March 28 over 2000m defeating Prince Levi with 52kg at $26. Before that 6th of 13 at Gold Coast Gc Stakes on March 14 over 1800m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Encoder with 54kg at $31. Big chance to go back-to-back.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up second last of 13 at Gold Coast Gc Stakes on March 14 over 1800m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Encoder with 55kg at $61. Second-up ran last of 10 at this track Hcp on March 28 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Zoology carrying 55.5kg at $81. Won't be bothering these on recent runs.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running on entering the home straight.
From the outside barrier shifted behind runners in the early stages.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Held up rounding the home turn and in the early part of the straight.

form.formComment: Half-brother to Group 1 winner Nom Du Jeu. Most recently 7th of 10 at this track Hcp on March 28 over 2000m, 3 len behind Zoology carrying 54kg at $61. The start before that got back early 5th of 10 at Gold Coast Hcp on February 21 over 1800m, 6 len behind Capital Asset with 55kg at $8. Not keen on his chances.

form.formComment: Most recently didn't finish the race at Ballina Bm82 (81) March 23 over 1590m. The start before that ran last of 7 at Eagle Farm Cl6 on March 7 over 1600m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Last Command carrying 52kg at $6.50. Maybe a place.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Steadied approaching the 200m when Free Carry shifted out.
Shifted out under pressure in the home straight.
Laid in under pressure in the early stages of the home straight.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
Bumped on jumping away. Laid in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 12 at Randwick in the G3 Aspiration on March 7 over 1600m, 6 len behind Pinito with 53kg at $151. Second-up 7th of 14 at Rosehill in the G3 Epona on March 21 over 1900m, slow going 4.5 len behind Machine Gun Gracie with 57kg at $151. Capable of a better showing. Tough to beat if near her best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: After beginning only fairly, shifted out and made contact with Placid Pearl.
From a wide barrier, shifted behind runners in the early stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run from last on the turn 5th of 10 at this track Hcp on March 28 over 2000m, 2.75 len behind Zoology carrying 52kg at $81. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Obliged to alter course passing the 250m to improve into clear running.

Slow to begin and lost significant ground.
Hampered on jumping away. Laid out rounding the turn from the 800m.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 10 at Eagle Farm Cl6 on April 4 over 1600m, 3 len behind Lupine carrying 58.5kg at $11.
